product_name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild: Zelda (Standard edition)

bullets: Officially licensed Zelda: Breath of the Wild collectible statue — Zelda, Standard Edition
Zelda in a commanding pose holding the Sheikah Slate
Base design based on the symbol that initiates the Sheikah Slate interface
Collector's box doubles as a diorama backdrop for added visual aesthetics
content.description:
The highly detailed Zelda PVC statue is seen striking a static yet commanding pose, with the Sheikah Slate in hand. The design on the base is based on the symbol that initiates when activating the Sheikah Slate interface.
The statue is housed in a beautifully designed collector's box, which can also turn and double as a diorama backdrop for added visual aesthetics.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild – Zelda 10" PVC Painted statue
• Collector’s Box
• F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
